description: Canonical URLs for the four PiP source windows. All four are Chrome windows. Fill URLs after running capture_chrome_window_urls.sh in each view, or set from known stable links.
views: View 1 = main; View 2 = lower-left; View 3 = lower-right; View 4 = bottom center (Control-Left/Right)

window1_main.label: PiP Capture (main)
window1_main.note: YouTube video from contributor bootybunt; exact URL varies by video. Capture from browser or set manually.

window2_lowerLeft.label: Aux2 (lower-left)
window2_lowerLeft.note: Bloomberg Live (current). Was Al Jazeera; swapped per user.

window4_center.label: Aux4Center_* (bottom center)
window4_center.url_wrong_note: Previous DW/YouTube assumptions; center is now BBC News on BBC site.
window4_center.note: BBC News live via BBC website (iPlayer/watch-live); not a YouTube URL.
